3 things need a look

Needs a look: Where your work is kept, AI helper, Google Calendar.

Signed in

Signing in works. This demo isn't linked to a real account yet.

Where your work is kept

Your work is kept on this device only. It isn't saved to an account yet.

Connected apps2 things need a look.

AI helper

The AI helper isn't turned on yet. Anything you capture is sorted with built-in rules.

Google Calendar

No calendar is connected yet, so everything you plan stays inside LifeOS.

Nothing has been waiting on someone else for too long.

Technical names and raw values, for someone debugging LifeOS. You do not need any of this for normal use.
